S67.notes: apply_polars_categorical_fixes now returns enum_domains; _main_train_suite stashes them into metadata.enum_domains; predict-time _coerce_cat_dtype_for_lgb_xgb threads enum_domains into pl.Enum cast (OOV -> null via strict=False); legacy bundles WARN-fallback to pl.Categorical. preprocessing.transforms.prepare_df_for_catboost gains per-Series Enum preserve path. test_fe_preod_enum_domain.py also updated to use attribute access on the now-9-field NamedTuple.

D1_P2_7.notes: TrainingSplitConfig.bucket_stratify default True. Regression branch added: bin y into deciles (quartile for n<5000), stratify on bucket id. Group+bucket: groups wins (precedence INFO line) when iterstrat unavailable; with iterstrat installed, both combined upstream via existing iterstrat path. Timestamps -> temporal split wins (no bucket path).

D1_P2_8.notes: Assertion in explain() that self.X_boruta row count == self.X row count (with sample=False). INFO log records n_train + n_basis + sampled flag. Two sensors: (a) captor verifies shap_values called with n_basis=80=n_train; (b) deliberately-mismatched X/X_boruta triggers the AssertionError.

D1_P2_10.notes: make_train_test_split emits a one-line INFO with train_max/val_range/test_range/val->train_gap_days/train->prod_estimated_gap_days when timestamps + default val_placement='forward'. Three sensors: fires on default forward+timestamps, suppressed without timestamps, suppressed under explicit backward.

D1_Low_11.notes: TrainingSplitConfig.composite_cardinality_cap exposed (default 200, ge=2). _MAX_COMPOSITE_CARDINALITY in _phase_helpers_fit_split now pulled from split_config. Rationale comment inline.

D1_Low_12.notes: Pre-screen now also pulls group/ts column names from extractor.{group_field,timestamps_column,ts_column,timestamp_field} and split_config.{group_field,timestamps_column,ts_column}. Defensive WARN when split_config.use_groups=True but protected set ended up empty.

D1_Low_13.notes: _cast_utf8_cats_to_categorical now emits a one-line WARN per column when falling back to bare pl.Categorical (no enum_domains). enum_domains path stays silent (confirmed by test_d1_low_13_enum_domain_path_does_not_warn).

green_paths: tests/training/test_fe_preod_enum_domain.py (1 test, fixed for new NamedTuple shape)
test_results.sibling_sweep: Initial sibling sweep flagged test_fe_preod_enum_domain.py::test_precomputed_union_keeps_rare_val_category_alive failing on 8-tuple positional unpack of the now-9-field NamedTuple; fixed by switching to attribute access (._result.train_df_polars etc). Re-run all targeted tests after fix: 31 passed, 0 failed.

commits: d7da291f feat(split): expose composite_cardinality_cap + bucket_stratify on TrainingSplitConfig
a2d9e73c fix(polars-fixes): warn on bare pl.Categorical fallback + return enum_domains
7dfd6d5a feat(split): regression bucket-stratify default ON; respect configurable cap
bdeeee22 fix(pre-screen): double-source group/ts column protection from extractor + split_config
b54e7cc9 feat(split): one-line INFO surfacing implied temporal layout on default forward placement
9eed863d fix(boruta_shap): assert SHAP background == train X + log n_train
34d61b0a feat(predict): persist train enum_domains in model meta + thread to predict cat-cast
